## What do you want to fine-tune?

Example: support bot, domain Q&A, extractor, classifier, writing style, code helper.

## What data do you have?

- [ ] CSV
- [ ] JSONL chat data
- [ ] instruction/output examples
- [ ] documents
- [ ] no data yet

## What should success look like?

Describe 2-3 example prompts and ideal answers.

## Hardware / environment

- Local GPU / VRAM:
- Colab / cloud:
- Unsure:

- [ ] Hugging Face
- [ ] Ollama / GGUF
- [ ] local chat only
- [ ] not sure
